response.justification: Bogdan is a strong generalist engineer with impressive breadth across web, mobile, and systems programming, but he does not meet the mandatory requirements for this role. His professional C++ experience amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on Windows C++ development. His database experience is MySQL and MongoDB rather than SQL Server or Oracle, and he has no fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain exposure — RIDE Capital was fintech-adjacent web development in Node/TypeScript, not investment banking systems. The core stack mismatch is too large for a consulting engagement expecting immediate domain productivity.
strengths: Solid systems-programming fundamentals, including low-latency, high-throughput services (millions of requests/sec) in D at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Strong software craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and authorship of open-source testing frameworks
Polyglot adaptability with some professional C/C++ exposure (NI LabWindows/CVI) and CI/CD plus scripting experience matching the optional skills
concerns: Only ~7 months of professional C++ experience versus the mandatory 5-10 years on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; SQL background is limited to MySQL and MongoDB
No fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge, which the role requires

key_factors.factor: Missing capital markets / fixed income domain expertise
Strong general engineering and testing fundamentals
